failures.description: The agent made an invalid tool invocation by calling ProductCatalogSearch with missing and incorrectly typed arguments instead of the required string item_id and product_id.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The correct plan and required identifiers were already available: item_id="1096508426" and product_id="1808611083". At index 2, the agent produced a concrete ProductCatalogSearch invocation with malformed arguments: {"product_id": 0}. This omitted the required item_id and used a non-string, wrong product_id value. The tool then explicitly returned a SchemaError at index 3. The issue was not resolved later.
